title: Donald Black
compiled_truth: Donald Black is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-26 to 2001-07-19), Donald Black sent 20 and received 174 emails, totalling 194 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (19), [Lou Stoler](people/lou-stoler) (8), [Scott Healy](people/scott-healy) (7), [Yvan Chaxel](people/yvan-chaxel) (6), [Mike Miller](people/mike-miller) (6).
